title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> If they guess correctly, they get a s
content:
✔ If they guess correctly, they get a small reward (XP bonus or minor buff).
✔ Full alignments are only revealed at the final challenge.

📜 Why This Works:
• Players don’t consciously “game” their alignment—they act naturally.
• Weekly logs track choices without daily overhead.
• Students will be surprised by their final alignment & its impact.

📜 3. The Multi-Tiered True Ending – How It’s Won

📜 The True Ending is dynamic, based on multiple win conditions.
✔ There is not just one “winner”—it depends on different factors.
✔ Multiple groups may win in different ways.

Paths to Winning the True Ending
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 256 (chunk 256/555)
